meaning: n.不再当机密文件处理,从机密表删除
examples: Where it is impossible to determine the secrecy period, the conditions for declassification shall be determined.
Organs and entities shall determine the specific secrecy period, declassification time or declassification conditions according to their respective work needs.
The existence of a secret programme to produce Britain's own stealth plane has been revealed with the declassification of a single photograph and a short statement.
Not surprisingly, a lot of babies are now being thrown out with the declassification bathwater.
Provides guidance for the first time regarding the declassification of non-archival and non-record material.
